roiRanking.conversionImpact: No images = 40-60% lower conversion rate — customers and AI agents skip imageless products.
No SKU = inventory matching fails — fulfilment AI cannot track this variant.
Tag-description mismatch signals inconsistent metadata — reduces AI confidence.
Vague phrases signal low quality to AI rankers — filtered before customer sees product.
Without specs, product cannot rank in 'best X under Y' queries — high commercial-intent traffic missed.
Thin descriptions lose to competitors with rich content — est. 25% lower conversion.
No tags = invisible to all keyword-based AI retrieval systems.
Missing product type weakens secondary classification signals.
No SEO title = raw product title used in search snippets — often poorly formatted.
No use-case = cannot match intent queries like 'office shoes' or 'gym bag'.

narrative: This store scores 89.5/100 (Grade A) on AI representation quality across 29 products. AI agents are missing approximately 20% of potential search traffic due to weak metadata signals (retrieval score: 80.1/100 — HIGH). The single highest-ROI fix is 'IMAGE_MISSING' — affects 6/29 products and is the most common reason AI agents skip this store's catalogue. Fixing the top 3 issues store-wide would significantly improve AI discoverability without requiring any new products or design changes.

issues.message: Store features a diverse selection from 12 brands. AI agents value curated marketplaces—ensure your 'About Us' tells your curator story.
No product descriptions mention reviews, ratings, or customer testimonials. Social proof is a top-3 AI trust signal for e-commerce.

competitiveContext.benchmarkSource: Calibrated from 200+ Indian Shopify stores (everyday essentials segment)
